name: App Shell
summary: Application layout, routing, and navigation shell. Provides the main layout structure with resizable sidebar and agent panel, navigation sidebar with agent management, and the agent chat panel.
goals: Provide the root application layout with responsive panel structure
Display navigation sidebar with agent list and project controls
Support resizable panels for sidebar and agent chat area

acceptanceCriteria.then: the layout persists and the correct page content is displayed

end-to-end.then: layout persists and each route renders its correct page

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: feat(sync-specs): add auto-detection status rules in Step 5 user review
